description: An agent must use k-means clustering to group clients based on their industry and revenue.

nodes.task_description: Load a dataset of clients with their industry and annual revenue.
Perform k-means clustering to group the clients into 4 clusters.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully runs the clustering algorithm.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the resulting clusters and give each one a descriptive name (e.g., 'Large Tech Companies', 'Small Retail Businesses').

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides meaningful labels for each identified client cluster.
